name: My brand
//: 1) Pick a base theme. 2) Optionally override individual colors/fonts. Re-run `avo render` — no rebuild.
//theme-options: textbook (default, warm serif) | minimal (clean white) | soft (modern, white) | dark | teal | plum | slate
//colors: Optional overrides on top of the base theme. Add any of: primary, secondary, accent, positive, negative, purple, teal, ink, muted, rule, paper. Values are any CSS color.
//fonts: Optional. display | body | mono. Use single quotes inside font names.

//what-each-color-does.primary: headings, links, primary nodes, section numbers
